F
FreeTier
Data open-source·Updated May 26, 2026

Free tiers for
indie SaaS builders.

37 tools across 9 categories. Every entry has a free tier or generous plan. Build your entire SaaS stack without spending a cent.

37 of 37

Hosting

Vercelref100GB/mo

Static + serverless hosting. 100GB bandwidth, 6000 build mins. Hobby plan is free.

Netlifyref100GB/mo

Static hosting with 100GB bandwidth, 300 build mins. Serverless functions included.

Railwayref$5 credit

$5 credit monthly. Deploy any Docker container. No cold starts.

Renderref750hrs/mo

Static sites free. Web services from $0 with 750hrs runtime. PostgreSQL $0 with 1GB.

Fly.io3 VMs

Run full-stack apps close to users. 3 shared VMs free. Pay-as-you-go after.

Cloudflare PagesUnlimited

Unlimited bandwidth for static sites. Workers free tier with 100k requests/day.

Databases

Supabaseref500MB

Postgres with 500MB database, 50MB file storage, 2GB bandwidth. Auth + realtime included.

PlanetScaleref5GB

MySQL-compatible serverless DB. 1B row reads, 10M writes, 5GB storage.

Neonref0.5GB

Serverless Postgres. 0.5GB storage, 100 compute hrs, branching included.

Turso9GB

SQLite on the edge. 500 databases, 9GB storage, 1B row reads. Ultra-low latency.

MongoDB Atlas512MB

512MB shared cluster. Perfect for prototyping and small apps.

Auth

Clerkref10K MAU

Complete auth with 10,000 MAU free. Social login, MFA, organizations included.

Lucia AuthUnlimited

Open-source auth library. Self-hosted. No limits. Works with any database.

Better AuthUnlimited

Open-source auth for TypeScript. Self-hosted. Framework-agnostic.

Auth0ref25K MAU

25,000 MAU free. Enterprise-grade auth with SSO, MFA, passwordless.

Email & Communication

Resendref100/day

100 emails/day free. Modern email API for developers. React email templates.

SendGrid100/day

100 emails/day free via Twilio. SMTP and API delivery.

Loopsref1K contacts

Transactional email for SaaS. 1,000 contacts free. Great onboarding sequences.

Brevoref300/day

300 emails/day. Marketing + transactional in one platform. Unlimited contacts.

Analytics

PlausibleSelf-host free

Privacy-first analytics. Self-hosted option is completely free. No cookies.

UmamiSelf-host free

Open-source Google Analytics alternative. Self-host for free. Clean dashboard.

PostHogref1M events

1M events/month free. Product analytics, session replay, feature flags, A/B testing.

Tinybird1K reqs/day

Real-time analytics API. 1,000 API reqs/day, 10GB processed data.

AI & LLMs

GroqFree API

Free LLM API. Ultra-fast inference for open models. No rate limits on free tier.

Google AI Studio1500/day

Gemini 2.5 Flash free tier. 1,500 requests/day. 1M token context.

Together AI$5 credit

$5 free credit. Run open-source models: Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek.

DeepSeek APIPay-as-you-go

Cheapest paid API. V3 at $0.27/1M input tokens. No free tier but costs pennies.

OpenAI APIFree credits

Free credits on signup. GPT-4.1 Nano at $0.10/1M tokens. Pay-as-you-go.

Payments

StriperefNo monthly fee

No monthly fee. 2.9% + 30¢ per transaction. Payment links, subscriptions, invoices.

Lemon SqueezyrefNo monthly fee

MoR for digital products. 5% + 50¢ per sale. Handles global tax/VAT.

PaddleNo monthly fee

MoR for SaaS. 5% + 50¢. Handles global tax compliance. B2B focused.

Monitoring

Sentryref5K errors

5K errors/month, 1K performance units, 50MB attachments. Error tracking for devs.

Better Stack10 monitors

Uptime monitoring with 3-min checks. Status pages. 10 monitors, 30-day logs.

Grafana Cloud10K metrics

10K metrics, 50GB logs, 50GB traces. Full observability stack.

CMS

Sanityref100K reqs

Headless CMS. 100K API requests/month. Real-time collaboration. Free for solo devs.

StrapiSelf-host free

Open-source headless CMS. Self-hosted version is completely free.

Hygraph1M calls

GraphQL-native headless CMS. 1M API calls, 100GB assets. Content federation.

Suggest a tool

Know a great free tier we missed? The data is open-source — submit a PR or open an issue on GitHub.
